plugins.name: agentkeeper
plugins.description: Security scanning, compliance auditing, threat detection, and connected dashboard hooks for Claude Code. Warns on credential exfiltration, reverse shells, prompt injection, and 24+ threat patterns. Works immediately, no account required.
